description_long: This is a single-serving chocolate cupcake with a brown, ridged paper liner encasing the cake base. The top is elaborately decorated with coral-pink buttercream roses, each petal carefully piped to create a realistic floral effect. Green buttercream leaves are interspersed among the roses, adding a natural touch and contrast to the pink flowers. The cake's surface is slightly domed, and the icing is thick and textured, giving the appearance of a lush bouquet. The paper liner is white with a brown gradient, and the cake itself appears moist and dense. No candles or additional decorations are present, and the cupcake is not displayed on any plate or stand.
description: A chocolate cupcake in a brown paper liner, topped with coral-pink buttercream roses and green leaves, creating a floral bouquet effect.
description_view_0: Front view shows three prominent buttercream roses and a central green leaf, with the paper liner's white and brown gradient visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the cluster of roses and reveals more of the green leaves on the left side, with the floral arrangement appearing fuller.
description_view_2: The roses are seen from a slightly different angle, with two green leaves more visible and the bouquet effect emphasized.
description_view_3: This view shows the roses from the opposite side, with a tall green leaf standing upright and the arrangement appearing slightly more open.
